title: 2023 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
summary: Koniag’s Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held Saturday, October 7, 2023, in Anchorage, Alaska. Please join us at the Dena’ina Civic and Convention Center at 600 W. Seventh Ave for updates about the corporation, election results, door prizes, and a meal. An Alutiiq dance performance will begin...

title: Wishing Russ Talvi a Happy Retirement!
summary: After 11 incredible years of dedicated service, our Alaska SBDC Fairbanks Center Director, Russ Talvi, is embarking on a well-deserved retirement! title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 2 October, 2023
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 2 October, 2023 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .
